system.powerDescription:
Once per rest, pick a living target or object of up to CAT size within range. For the duration of this scene the two of you cannot move beyond short range of one another, encountering impossible-to-break physical resistance whenever one of you tries. If a target under this effect was to teleport, demanifest, or escape into a pocket dimension, it does not. This effect ends once you or the target have taken CAT+3 slashes. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active. 

This power cannot be willingly ended early.
